title: The Prophecy
overview: When Uncle Ho stayed at Viet Bac war zone, he predicted victory in 1954. Reality reflected the accuracy of his genius analysis. On Oct, 10th, 1954, soldiers liberated the capital after the Dien Bien Phu victory.
